top_findings.summary: The skill description includes "Bash(*)" as an allowed tool, which grants unrestricted system command execution. For a 5S auditing skill focused on scoring, photo documentation, and tracking, this level of system access (e.g., arbitrary command execution, file system traversal, network operations) is excessive and unrelated to its stated purpose of conducting workplace organization audits. The skill could operate with more limited permissions such as file read/write for audit data and photos, without requiring full bash command execution.
